serverBusyMessage: Server is busy. Please try again in a few minutes.
premiumTierLimitExhaustedBody: Limit exhausted for this model. We will switch to another appropriate model based on your prompt.
agentDisabledTitle: {agentName} has been disabled by your team admin
agentDisabledDescription: You can view this conversation, but follow-up questions are unavailable. To continue conversing, ask your admin to re-enable {agentName} for your team.
agentDisabledSnackbar: {agentName} has been disabled by your team admin.
customAssistantUnavailable: The Custom Assistant is either inaccessible or deleted.
articleOptimizedError: There was an error optimizing your article.
optimizeNewArticleLink: Click here to optimize a new article.
presentationGenerateError: There was an error generating your presentation.
imageGenAvailableInAssistants: Image generation is now directly available in all assistants.
encryptionKeyNotFound: Encryption key not found. Please logout and login again.
pinNotFound: PIN not found. Please enter your PIN to continue.
llmMayMakeMistakesPartner: LLM may make mistakes. Double-check important info
llmMayMakeMistakesWald: Wald.ai may make mistakes. Double-check important info
scheduledMaintenanceBody: We are currently performing scheduled maintenance. We will be back soon.
purchaseRequiredBody: You are not allowed to use AI All-Access Pack until you buy a plan at {brandName}.
teamBannedTitle: Your Team Account has been Banned!
teamDeactivatedTitle: Your Team Account has been Deactivated!
teamPendingDeletionTitle: Your Team Account is Pending Deletion!
teamBannedBody: Your team account has been banned
teamBannedAndDeletedTitle: Your Team Account has been Deleted!
teamBannedAndDeletedBody: Your banned team account has been deleted and is pending permanent removal
teamDeactivatedBody: Your team account has been deactivated
teamPendingDeletionBody: Your team account is pending deletion
blockedAccountSuffix: , and you won't be able to use the application features. For more information,
contactSupportResolve: please contact support to resolve this issue.
contactAdminResolve: contact your team admin to resolve this issue.
addPaymentMethodRequired: You need to add a payment method to reactivate subscription.
teamBlockedResubscribe: Your team is blocked from resuming subscription. If you think this is a mistake, please reach out to us on our
accountSetupTitle: Your account is being set up
accountSetupBody:
We noticed you signed up using {email} through the Google Cloud Marketplace. As part of that flow, your account needs to be manually activated on our end.

This usually takes just a few minutes. We'll notify you by email as soon as your account is ready to use.

Thanks for your patience!
researchAgentDescription: Generate comprehensive reports with deep web search
seoOptimizerDescription: Evaluate your content based on SEO criteria
presentationBuilderDescription: Create a presentation using your files or the internet
researchAgentTileDescription: Generate reports with deep web search
presentationBuilderTileDescription: Create a presentation using your files or the internet
articleWriterGuideDescription: Elevate your writing and create compelling articles
greetingWhatCanIHelp: What can I help with today?
switchingEngineSanitizeNote: This will start a new chat. {brandShortName} sanitizes sensitive information before sending your prompts to external AI assistants like {llm}.
switchingEnginePrivateNote: {engineDisplayName} does not require sanitization because it's a private model with zero data retention.
switchingEngineProceedNote: Click 'OK' to proceed to a new chat or 'Cancel' to continue chat with {brandShortName}.
editReplacementDescription: Tell us what the replacement should be for "{originalText}". We will show this text instead of our substitution hence forth.
pinPlanReadyTitle: Your AI All-Access Privacy+ Plan is Ready
pinPlanReadyDescription: To keep your conversations end-to-end encrypted, please create a PIN.
secureAccountDescription: Set a PIN to encrypt your data and safeguard your privacy.
enterVerificationPinDescription: We will ask for your PIN periodically to help you remember and keep your account secure.
changePinDescription: To keep your data safe, please set a PIN for your account. This PIN will be used to encrypt your data and ensure your privacy.
forgotPinDescription: Only your team admin can reset your account PIN. Would you like to send a reset request?
somethingWentWrongTryAgain: Something went wrong, please try again.
soleAdminWarning: Attention: You are currently the sole admin for this account. To prevent potential lockouts, consider adding additional admins.
askAdminApproveUser: Please ask your admin to approve the user.
adminRegistrationIncomplete: Your team setup is incomplete. Please ask your team admin ({adminName}) to complete end-to-end encryption registration.
resetPinFailed: Failed to reset PIN. Please try again. Reach out to us at {supportContact} if the problem persists.
allSetEncryptionNote: All conversations are end-to-end encrypted. We have sent a recovery key to your email that can be used to access your account if you forget your PIN.
allSetTrialNote: Your 14-day FREE trial begins today and will expire on <bold>{date}</bold>. We'll send you payment reminders as you approach this date.
requestSentBody: We've notified your team admin of your request. You will receive an email notification once your PIN has been successfully reset.
adminForgotPinSingleAdmin: As the only admin of this account, you can upload your admin key, which was downloaded during onboarding and sent to your email<dateHint></dateHint>, with the subject "Admin Recovery Keys" (attached as <bold>admin_recovery_keys.json</bold>), to reset your PIN.
adminForgotPinMultiAdmin: As the admin of this account, you can upload your admin key, which was downloaded during onboarding and sent to your email<dateHint></dateHint>, with the subject "Admin Recovery Keys" (attached as <bold>admin_recovery_keys.json</bold>), or you can ask a fellow admin to reset your PIN. How would you like to proceed?
requestOtherAdminResetPin: Request other admin to reset PIN
researchAgentPlaceholder: Tell me what you'd like to research on…
articleWriterPlaceholder: Tell us what your article is about and how long you'd like it to be…
seoOptimizerPlaceholder: Paste your content here to optimize...
presentationBuilderPlaceholder: Enter the presentation topic, be as detailed as possible with URLs too...
webSearchNotSupported: Web Search not supported for this model
fileExceedsSizeLimit: One or more files exceed the size limit of 100 MB
totalFileSizeExceedsLimit: Total file size exceeds the limit of {limitGb} GB
voiceInputNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
seoKeywordTooltip: Enter a keyword for SEO optimization
incognitoChatDescription: Your organization has enabled Incognito Mode for you. Your conversations will not be logged and are not visible to anyone else.
enterPinTryAgain: Please enter your PIN, Try again after entering PIN
engineSwitchPromptHasCode: We detected code in your prompt and switched to the {engineDisplayName} for safer processing.
engineSwitchFileUsage: We detected one or more attachments in your prompt and switched to the {engineDisplayName} for safer processing.
engineSwitchSanitizationFailed: One or more sanitization models are currently experiencing downtime so we've switched to {engineDisplayName} for safer processing.
engineSwitchPreviousNeeded: We switched to the {engineDisplayName} for safer processing.
engineSwitchLongQuery: Your query is longer than our sanitization limit, so we've switched to {engineDisplayName} for safer processing.
engineSwitchModelDeprecated: The selected model is deprecated, so we've switched to {engineDisplayName}.
engineSwitchModelDisallowed: The selected model is disallowed, so we've switched to {engineDisplayName}.
adminLlmControlsNote: Admins: External LLMs can be enabled for code and file uploads from
switchedEarlier: Switched To {engine} earlier in the conversation
switchedFileUsage: Switched To {engine} because files are being referred to in this chat
switchedPromptHasCode: Switched To {engine} because code was detected or token limit was exceeded in the prompt.
switchedSanitizationFailed: Switched To {engine} due to sanitization failure
switchedSanitizationInterrupted: Switched To {engine} because sanitization was interrupted
switchedModelDeprecated: Switched To {engine} because the selected model is deprecated
switchedModelDisallowed: Switched To {engine} because the selected model is disallowed
switchedCustomAssistantUnavailable: Switched To {engine} because custom assistant was unavailable
craftingPresentationSubtext: It may take a few minutes. Hang tight while we make something great!
imageResponseFallback: Here's the image you asked for.
sentToSecureAssistant: *Your query was sent to our secure assistant {engine} and thus sanitization was not performed.*
processingImageSubtext: Lots of people are making images right now, so this might take a little bit. Hang tight!
presentationReadyToDownload: Your presentation is ready to download
chatRetentionTooltip: Chats are stored for {days} days based on your admin's settings, then permanently deleted.
deleteChatConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete: {title}
renameChatFailed: Failed to rename chat. Please try again later.
deleteChatFailed: Failed to delete chat. Please try again later.
updateChatFailed: Failed to update chat. Please try again later.
querySentConfirmation: Your query has been sent. We will get back to you soon.
pageDescriptionChat: Boost productivity with {brandName}, a private AI platform for businesses. Connects to popular AI assistants with top-tier data protection and compliance.
searchNoResults: No chats found. Try adjusting your search filters.
